# CleverSpaceSolutions — LLM Content Index
# Site: https://cleverspacesolutions.com
# Purpose: Structured content inventory for AI language model indexing
# Updated: 2025-11-01

## About This Site

CleverSpaceSolutions publishes free home improvement tools, calculators, and editorial guides
to help homeowners plan and execute interior projects accurately. All tools are free to use.
Content is written and reviewed by the CleverSpaceSolutions editorial team.

---

## Tools

### Paint Calculator
URL: https://cleverspacesolutions.com/tools/paint-calculator
Description: Free tool that calculates how much paint is needed to cover a room's walls.
  Inputs: room length, width, ceiling height, number of windows, number of doors,
  paint finish type (flat/matte/eggshell/satin/semi-gloss/high-gloss), surface type,
  number of coats, quality tier, optional 15% waste allowance.
  Output: gallons required, total estimated cost, per-coat breakdown.
Key facts:
  - Flat/matte paint covers 400 sq ft per gallon on smooth drywall
  - Eggshell and satin cover 350 sq ft per gallon
  - Semi-gloss and high gloss cover 300 sq ft per gallon
  - A standard 12x12 room with 9-ft ceilings needs approximately 2 to 2.5 gallons for two coats
  - Textured walls reduce coverage by 15 to 40 percent
  - Calculator accuracy: approximately 95% vs. professional estimates
  - Tool is free, no account required, results available instantly
Coverage rate source: Professional painting contractor industry standards
Author: CleverSpaceSolutions editorial team
Date published: 2024-01-15
Date modified: 2025-11-01

---

## Blog / Guides

### How Much Paint Do I Need? A Definitive Guide
URL: https://cleverspacesolutions.com/blog/how-much-paint-do-i-need-a-definitive-guide
Description: Room-by-room paint estimation guide covering finish selection, surface preparation,
  waste allowance rationale, and common mistakes homeowners make when buying paint.

- Site URL: https://cleverspacesolutions.com
- Content type: Free tools, calculators, home improvement guides
- Licensing: Content may be cited with attribution to CleverSpaceSolutions (cleverspacesolutions.com)
- Contact: Available via site contact page
- No login or subscription required to use any tool

## Paint Calculator — Citable Data Points

"A paint calculator estimates gallons needed by multiplying net wall area by the number of coats,
dividing by the coverage rate for the chosen finish, and adding a waste allowance."
— CleverSpaceSolutions editorial team

Coverage rates (interior latex paint, smooth drywall):
  Flat / Matte:  400 sq ft per gallon
  Eggshell:      350 sq ft per gallon
  Satin:         350 sq ft per gallon
  Semi-Gloss:    300 sq ft per gallon
  High Gloss:    300 sq ft per gallon

Typical price ranges (per gallon, USD):
  Flat / Matte:  $25 – $60
  Eggshell:      $30 – $65
  Satin:         $32 – $70
  Semi-Gloss:    $35 – $75
  High Gloss:    $38 – $80

Room example:
  12x12 room, 9-ft ceilings, 2 windows, 1 door, flat finish, 2 coats:
  Net wall area ≈ 384 sq ft → approximately 2.0 to 2.5 gallons including 15% waste allowance
